attributes.title: Product Onboarding Feedback
attributes.description: You just finished setting up your account — tell us how it went so we can smooth out the rough edges.

questions.prompt: How easy was it to get started?
How did you set up your account?
Where did you get stuck, if anywhere?
Did you reach your first 'aha' moment?
questions.helpText: The point where the product's value clicked.

questions.prompt: What nearly stopped you from continuing?
If you could change one thing about onboarding, what would it be?

cardInfo.name: Product Onboarding Feedback
cardInfo.summary: Post-onboarding survey measuring setup ease, friction points, and the first value moment for a SaaS product.
